hero.title: How to ship to Matanzas with Yumury
hero.subtitle: 4 steps. No surprises. No stress.

step1.title: Choose what to send
step1.body: Curated catalog of 160+ products: food, appliances, electric motorbikes. Bundles for every situation — blackouts, birthdays, emergencies.

step2.title: Select your family member
step2.body: Save your loved ones' details once: name, address, phone, preferences. Reorder in one click without retyping anything.

step3.title: Pay securely
step3.body: 100% secure payment with Stripe. Visa, Mastercard, American Express. We don't store card data. No hidden fees.

step4.title: Track your shipment in real time
step4.body: Visual tracking with photos at every stage: confirmation, preparation, transit, delivery. Share the link with your family via WhatsApp.

ctaFinal.title: Start shipping today
ctaFinal.subtitle: Your family in Matanzas is waiting

hero.title: Connecting families between Miami and Matanzas
hero.subtitle: Because distance shouldn't be a barrier to caring for your loved ones.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Yumury was born because we know what it means to be far from your family. Every Sunday without coffee with mom, every birthday over video call, every blackout feeling helpless. We decided to change that.

values.title: Our values
values.trustDesc: Your order is sacred. We care for it as if it were our own.
values.transparencyDesc: Tracking with photos at every stage. No surprises, no excuses.
values.speedDesc: Express in 3-5 days. Maritime for the big stuff. Always on time.
values.careDesc: We pack with love. Every package carries a piece of you.

matanzas.title: Why Matanzas
matanzas.subtitle: From the Yumurí to Varadero. We know every municipality.
